3111130.name: Student Council Wars
3111130.description:
Features:

This is not a regular Beat 'em up game. You need to lead your gal army to conquer different territories, and manage them. This game contains Beat 'em up, strategy and tower defense factors.

Territory-
Player can select the area you want to conquer. It is not a stage by stage beat 'em up game.

Battle-
Beside fighting alone like regular beat 'em up, player also can summon their gal army to help them during each battle.

Level up-
Player and gal army NPC will get level up to increase their abilities or stats.

Hero NPC-
Some NPCs are hero, they are partners of the player, Unlike other gal army, Heroes are characters in the game, they will not disappeared when defeated.
3111130.supported_languages: 英语, 日语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
